# Qwen-3.6 Lightweight Installer

Professional-grade deployment tool for the Qwen-3.6 ecosystem, focusing on autonomous agentic systems, local privacy, and high-performance inference.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Qwen-3.6 introduces a hybrid architecture (MoE + Linear Attention) supporting up to 1,000,000 tokens of context and native agentic reasoning.

## Core Features
- **Agentic Workflows**: Built-in self-reflection and auto-debugging. Capable of iterative terminal command execution in a sandboxed environment.
- **1M Context Window**: Powered by Linear Attention for processing massive codebases and documentation without quadratic scaling overhead.
- **Thinking Preservation**: Maintains logical "chain of thought" across multi-turn dialogues for architectural stability.
- **Spatial Intelligence**: Multi-modal capabilities including UI automation (screenshot-to-coordinates) and Figma-to-React conversion.
- **Performance**: Up to 170 tokens/sec (Turbo) with GGUF v5 quantization and optimized Linear Attention kernels.

## Installation Options
- **Qwen-3.6 Plus**: Cloud-based flagship reasoning. Requires internet. Dynamic quotas.
- **Qwen-3.6 MoE-35B**: Local-first private engine. Requires 16–32 GB RAM, 8GB+ VRAM (NVIDIA 30/40/50 series).
- **Qwen-3.6 Small**: Optimized for CPU/Integrated graphics (M-series, Intel Iris Xe). 

## Technical Integration
- **API Compatibility**: Provides a local server compatible with the OpenAI API.
- **Default Endpoint**: `http://localhost:11434`
- **IDE Support**: Seamless integration with Cursor, VS Code, and other tools via API override.
- **Environment**: Automated dependency and driver setup. Includes a sandboxed mode for safe execution of AI-generated terminal commands.

## Key Technical Specifications
- **Architecture**: MoE (Mixture of Experts) + Linear Attention.
- **Local Quantization**: GGUF v5.
- **Inference Engine**: Optimized for 2026-era GPU drivers.
- **License**: Apache License 2.0.
